# nomad_acl_tokens (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_acl_tokens" "tokens" {
  prefix = "a242"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `prefix` (String)

### Read-Only

- `acl_tokens` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--acl_tokens))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--acl_tokens"></a>
### Nested Schema for `acl_tokens`

Read-Only:

- `accessor_id` (String)
- `create_time` (String)
- `expiration_time` (String)
- `global` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `policies` (List of String)
- `roles` (Set of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--acl_tokens--roles))
- `type` (String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--acl_tokens--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `acl_tokens.roles`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
